decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id corridor_125th-street-manhattan already exists in the registry with the same source_id (2013_06_06_sbs_125th_cb1), corridor name '125th Street', borough 'Manhattan', and matching limits 'Amsterdam Avenue to Second Avenue'. The evidence quote mentions 'Amsterdam Av' which distinguishes it from corridor_125th-st-manhattan (which has Morningside Avenue limits). The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id; no different registry record is a better match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map illustrates the proposed SBS route for the M60 bus service. The route is shown as a purple line connecting various stops. Westbound stops are marked with blue circles, and eastbound stops are marked with yellow circles. The route starts in Manhattan at 125th Street
Stops at every subway/rail station on 125 th St plus Amsterdam Av and Second Av

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id corridor_astoria-boulevard-queens-2013-06 already exists in the registry with the same source_id (2013_06_06_sbs_125th_cb1), corridor name 'Astoria Boulevard', borough 'Queens', and description referencing the M60 SBS route between RFK Bridge and LaGuardia Airport. No other Astoria Boulevard record exists in the registry. The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M60 SBS stops at major intersections in Astoria and East Elmhurst
Other street design changes on Astoria Blvd still in development

proposed_relations.description: Both corridors are segments of the M60 Select Bus Service route, discussed in the same source document (2013_06_06_sbs_125th_cb1). 125th Street is the Manhattan segment and Astoria Boulevard is the Queens segment, with the M60 SBS route running between them via the RFK Bridge.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map illustrates the proposed SBS route for the M60 bus service. The route is shown as a purple line connecting various stops. Westbound stops are marked with blue circles, and eastbound stops are marked with yellow circles. The route starts in Manhattan at 125th Street
M60 SBS stops at major intersections in Astoria and East Elmhurst
